thought.text: The RISCV files are generated. Let me reconfigure properly and build:

reasoning_content: The RISCV gen files are generated. Let me configure with the right flags and rebuild.

tool_call.arguments: {"summary": "Reconfigure cmake with RISCV inc dir", "command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && cmake -S . -B build -DYatCC_LLVM_DIR=/workspace/YatCC/llvm 2>&1 | tail -10", "timeout": 60}
